rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §34.012, which governs seat belt instruction and safety clearinghouse duties for school districts. No overlap in subject matter or operative provisions.
quote: Sec. 34.012. THREE-POINT SEAT BELT INSTRUCTION; INFORMATION CLEARINGHOUSE.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses school bus seat belt instruction and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
